title: Vector Store Schema, Versioning, Tenancy, Updates, and Deletes · Failure Triage
summary: A preserved trace contains a plausible versioned vector-record lifecycle with one ingestion, normalization, chunking, lexical, embedding, index, filter, fusion, reranking, context, generation, citation, authorization, latency, or recovery defect; identify the first failed stage before repair. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in versioned vector-record lifecycle and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory,…
objectives: Define document, chunk, tenant, source, version, offsets, content hash, model, dimensions, vector, metadata, timestamps, and policy fields.
Reject queries when model, dimensions, preprocessing, metric, index, or schema versions are incompatible.
Make ingestion and reindexing idempotent with stable keys, generation identity, checkpoints, compare-and-swap, and reconciliation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

steps.title: RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Vector Tenancy Recovery
steps.instruction:
Append a runnable pure-Python function headed "# Evidence: rag-vector-tenancy-recovery-1k2f2d" that uses case 1159 to preserve document identity, model and index versions, tenant filters, idempotency, and deletion. Keep its defaults runnable, assert an invariant, and return observable changed-case evidence. Browser code must not import third-party packages, load models, open files or sockets, contact vector databases or provider APIs, read credentials or host state, execute commands, or cause external effects; verify those boundaries later with Python 3.14.6, pinned native packages, evaluated models, disposable data and indexes, controlled services, load, fault, recovery, security, accessibility, and production gates.

Evidence target: RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Vector Tenancy Recovery.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Rag Vector Tenancy Recovery into observable performance evidence. For RAG and Python Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Rag Vector Tenancy Recovery, keep Rag Vector Tenancy Recovery connected to executable Python retrieval, grounding, evaluation, and evidence decision evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-vector-tenancy-recovery-1k2f2d
# Competency: rag-vector-tenancy-recovery.
# Case 1159: a regulated document deletion request.
# Operating constraint: keep browser execution pure, deterministic, bounded, and free of model, vector-database, network, file, credential, and host effects.
# Changed case: replace one exact identifier with a synonym and compare lexical, dense, and hybrid recall.
def evidence_rag_vector_tenancy_recovery_1k2f2d(document_id: str = "policy-17", content_version: int = 6, index_version: int = 6, tenant_match: bool = True, tombstoned: bool = False, idempotent: bool = True) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_1k2f2d = "1k2f2d-d2f2k1-1159"
    assert evidence_variant_1k2f2d
    evidence_axes_1k2f2d = (
        "corpus1k2f2d",
        "queryd2f2k1",
        "tenant1159",
        "index1k2f2d1159",
        "promptd2f2k11159",
        "evaluation11591k2f2d",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_1k2f2d)) == 6
    if not document_id or content_version < 1:
        return False, content_version, "document-identity"
    if index_version != content_version:
        return False, index_version, "stale-index"
    if not tenant_match:
        return False, index_version, "tenant-filter"
    if tombstoned:
        return False, index_version, "deleted-document"
    if not idempotent:
        return False, index_version, "upsert-replay"
    assert index_version == content_version
    return True, index_version, "live-vector-record"
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
